title: How outliers affect losses
text: Outliers have large residuals $$r=y-y_{hat}$$. A loss that grows quickly with |r| gives outliers huge influence during fitting.

title: Compare growth rates
text: Linear growth (|r|) is more robust than quadratic $$r^2$$. Quartic $$r^4$$ is the most sensitive.

title: Which loss grows fastest?
text: Among $$|r|$$, $$r^2$$, and $$r^4$$, which increases the fastest when |r| is large?

title: Pick the robust loss
text: The mean absolute error (L1) corresponds to option B.
